title: calathea anulque
intro: Calathea anulque is a type of flowering plant in the Marantaceae family, commonly known as the prayer plant due to its unique ability to fold its leaves upwards at night resembling a prayer position. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Calathea anulque include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and boosting the immune system. Calathea anulque can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
